content:
# session_83 (iter-083) ‚Äî review summary

## Metadata
- Sorry (active cone): **3 ‚Üí 3 (flat count, real elimination underneath)**.
- File touched: `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/TensorObjInverse.lean` (SOLO `fine-grained` prove) + MEMORY.md.
- `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjInverse` ‚Üí **EXIT 0 (8325 jobs)**, green-mod-sorry, no errors, no new axioms (doctor clean). sync_leanok iter-083 (sha 612be55, +2/‚àí0 on `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`).
- 3 remaining sorry-owners: `dual_restrict_iso_comp` (L1302, body L1384), `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` (L1440, body L1462), `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L2161, body L2230).

## What landed
The iter-083 effort-break (S3 ‚Üí folded chain L1 + L2 + assembly) **delivered its headline**:

1. **S3 `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` (L1396) ‚Äî CLOSED, sorry-free in its own body.**
   The ~15-iter `restrictFunctor j` SOURCE-cat instance-diamond blocker is fully retired. Proof is a
   genuine 7-step folded L1+L2 assembly:
   `have hL2 := dual_restrict_iso_pullbackCongr (j‚â´U.Œπ, V.Œπ) hjŒπ M` ‚Üí `have hVeq` (4-step rw) ‚Üí
   `rw [hVeq, dual_restrict_iso_comp j U.Œπ M]` ‚Üí `unfold restrictCompReindex` ‚Üí
   `rw [dualIsoOfIso_trans]` ‚Üí `simp only [Iso.trans_assoc]` ‚Üí `rfl`.
   **Keystone defeq:** `(Œ±.symm).app X ‚â° (Œ±.app X).symm` (`Iso.app` has `hom := Œ±.hom.app X`), so head/tail
   differ only by this defeq and `rfl` closes after `Iso.trans_assoc` aligns bracketing. No `Iso.symm_app`
   lemma (does not exist) needed. The old monolithic `‚òÖpb-iso`/`iso_symm_fold_cancel`/`hR` scaffolding is
   deleted; seam now crossed ONLY inside L1's proof.

2. **General B2 `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_general_hom` (L1230) + `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_general` (L1266) ‚Äî NEW, sorry-free, axiom-clean, live-used.**
   Literal-composite `f ‚â´ g` RFIP composition law with NO `restrictFunctorCongr`/`pullbackCongr`
   congruence legs (the chart `_comp_compat` is `X.Opens`-bound and carries the congruences; L1 needs the
   general literal-composite form). `_hom`: `conjugateEquiv` injectivity onto `pushforward (f‚â´g)`, distribute
   the 4-leg product via three `‚Üê conjugateEquiv_comp`, telescope (c2‚Ü¶`pushforwardComp.hom`,
   c5‚Ü¶`pushforwardComp.inv`, c3/c4‚Ü¶`ùüô`) ‚Äî NO `conjugateEquiv_reindexCongr` (legs absent). `_general`:
   `Adjunction.homEquiv.injective` + `leftAdjointUniq` skeleton, residual `.hom`-naturality = `_general_hom`.
   Live sites L1287 / L1314.

3. **L1 `dual_restrict_iso_comp` (L1302) ‚Äî NEW, authored + reduced to the SCP-cocycle core (1 sorry).**
   Mirrors the (deleted) chart S3 reduction for a literal composite. `dual_restrict_iso_eq_comparison`
   unfolds `D(f‚â´g)`; general B2 expands the leading RFIP; `congr 1` cancels the `restrictFunctorComp` head;
   `mapIso_naturality_assoc`/`hR`/`hsplit`/`iso_cancel_left`/`iso_symm_fold_cancel` reduce to the clean
   **‚òÖpb-iso** residual (literal composite, no `pullbackCongr`). **STEP A done:**
   `rw [presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict f g M]` (bridge (c)) expands `Œ∏_{f‚â´g}`. **STEP B remaining
   (sole open sorry, L1384):** distribute the outer `sheafification.mapIso` over the bridge-(c) composite,
   cancel the `sheafify Œ∏_f`/`dualIsoOfIso` tails, discharge the pure SCP-cocycle by bridge (b)
   `sheafificationCompPullback_comp f g` (`.hom`-level, `Iso.ext`).

## Convergence read
**Honest PARTIAL with a REAL elimination ‚Äî clearly converging, NOT churn.** The flat 3‚Üí3 count masks the
substance: the actual multi-iter blueprint-target blocker (S3) is now sorry-free, and the residual moved
from the diamond-laden `restrictFunctor j` SOURCE-cat seam to a cleaner, freshly-introduced L1 SCP-cocycle
core (STEP B) that is the dual mirror of the PROVEN tensor `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` SCP step. Two new
sorry-free B2 lemmas were also added. This is exactly the effort-break paying off: the seam is now confined
inside ONE lemma's proof (L1), and L1's residual is a single, well-understood, mirror-of-proven goal.

## Lake-verified pitfalls discovered this iter (reusable)
- `rw` of `mapIso_naturality` / `Iso.trans_assoc` across the `Functor.comp_obj` object-index defeq ‚Üí
  "did not find pattern" for general `f,g`. **Use `erw`** (defeq-but-not-syntactic indices).
- For STEP-B distribution: **`erw [Functor.mapIso_trans √ó3]` OVER-REACHES** ‚Äî unfolds `Œ∏_g`'s
  `H1.symm ‚â™‚â´ isoMk(sliceDualTransport)` internals through `(pullback œÜ_f).mapIso`, exposing
  `sliceDualTransport` and wrecking the goal. Must use PRECISE term-mode `Functor.mapIso_trans F i j`.
- The **‚òÖpb-iso residual CANNOT be extracted to a standalone `private lemma`** ‚Äî its STATEMENT
  (`dualIsoOfIso (restrictFunctorComp f g)` adjacent to sheafified `Œ∏_f`) re-triggers the durable iter-082
  infinite-whnf junction (whnf timeout at 200k HB on the bare statement). Typable ONLY inline, where the
  `rw`-produced goal already has unified object indices.

## Subagents (review phase)
- **lean-auditor** `iter083`: 0 critical / **1 major** / 2 minor ‚Äî `task_results/lean-auditor-iter083.md`.
  S3 close GENUINE (7 real steps, real `rfl` on the defeq, no hidden sorry/admit/axiom escape); both general
  B2 lemmas sorry-free + axiom-clean + live-used; L1 STEP-B + the 3 sorries all confirmed genuine residuals.
  **Major = stale `.lean` comment L1169** "(see the `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` sorry below)" ‚Äî
  that lemma is now body-sorry-free; the active sorry is in `dual_restrict_iso_comp` (L1384). Review cannot
  edit `.lean`; flagged for prover/refactor (see recommendations). Minors: `maxHeartbeats 6400000` on S3 (L1386)
  may need re-tuning once L1's sorry closes (its `rfl` is artificially cheap now); S3/S4a `private` with no
  live call site until telescope closes.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `tensorobjinverse-iter083`: **0 must-fix** / 1 major / minors ‚Äî
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tensorobjinverse-iter083.md`. L1/L2/S3 all match blueprint
  term-for-term; L1's open sorry has correct markers. **Major = B2 coverage debt** ‚Äî the NEW
  `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_general(_hom)` are un-blueprinted, and L1's `\uses`/prose mis-point at the
  structurally-different chart B2 `lem:restrictfunctorisopullback_comp_compat`. Addressed chapter-side
  (see markers); planner to add a blueprint block + repoint.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:dual_restrict_iso_comp` (after `\uses`, ~L8403): added iter-083
  `% NOTE` (lvb major) ‚Äî realized L1 uses the NEW general literal-composite B2 `..._comp_general(_hom)`
  (head `restrictFunctorComp`, no congr legs), NOT the chart `_comp_compat` cited; coverage debt; planner to
  blueprint the general B2 + repoint `\uses`/prose.
- No `\leanok` override. (lvb noted L2/S3 proof-block `\leanok` not yet set; this is sync-owned. S3 is
  sorry-free in its own body but transitively rides L1's sorry ‚Äî `lake build` did NOT flag S3 as
  `uses sorry`, but the dependency is genuine; left entirely to the deterministic sync, no manual override.)

## Blueprint doctor
- Clean: no orphan chapters, every `\ref`/`\uses`/`\proves` resolves, no new `axiom` declarations.

## Recommendation headline (full list in recommendations.md)
Next iter: close L1 STEP-B (the ‚òÖpb-iso SCP-cocycle core) from the clean EXIT-0 checkpoint via precise
term-mode `Functor.mapIso_trans` distribution + bridge (b) `sheafificationCompPullback_comp` discharge ‚Äî
this is the dual mirror of the proven tensor SCP step. Then S4a, then telescope (the terminal close).
